function.name: find
function.label: find
function.description: Search for files by glob pattern. Returns matching file paths relative to the search directory. Respects .gitignore. Output is truncated to 500 results or 50KB (whichever is hit first).

pattern.description: Glob pattern to match files, e.g. '*.ts', '**/*.json', or 'src/**/*.spec.ts'

path.description: Directory to search in (default: current directory)
